title: 皐月賞の後に・二代の決着

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, Mejiro Bright isn't able to win the
Satsuki Sho. I can clearly see the pain on her face
as she realizes she couldn't avenge Mejiro Ryan's
loss.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While touched to learn the reason Bright tried so
hard, Mejiro Ryan voices her preference that
Mejiro Bright run for herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan explains that when she lost the race herself,
it was due in part to the weight of the Mejiro
family's expectations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright smiles at the thought of running for
her own sake. With that, we set our sights on the
Japanese Derby.
